PUBLIC NOTICE COLORADO / GENERAL ACCESS

Public Notice Colorado Website Update
Background
Background
Low priority

The Public Notice Colorado website is available for users to search and access public notices from various newspapers in Colorado, but lacks specific current news items.

Why now: No current change found

Novelty: 3/5

Before publishing: Information about new partnerships, updated features, or changes to the search functionality.

Why this was flagged

This is a general service page that does not provide any newsworthy information at this time. Suggested treatment: background. Newsworthiness: 7/20 (immediacy 1, impact 2, conflict 1, novelty 3). Why now: No current change found.

Suggested next step

No specific action needed unless new content or changes are noted in the future. What would make this publishable: Information about new partnerships, updated features, or changes to the search functionality.

CITY OF LONGMONT PUBLIC INFORMATION / PUBLIC NOTICE

City to close Hover Street/CO 119 intersection for roof work
Background
Background
Seen before
Low priority

The city will temporarily shut down the intersection of Hover Street and CO 119 on June 28 for a library roof contract vote. This affects local traffic patterns and public access.

Beat memory: Similar topic 'Library Intersection Closure Scheduled' was first seen 2026-06-30T12:43:42.986306500+00:00, last seen 2026-06-30T12:43:42.986306500+00:00, and has appeared 1 previous time(s).

Why now: Beat memory found this topic before, and this scan did not identify a concrete new reportable fact.

Novelty: 3/5

Before publishing: The exact dates, times, affected roads, detour routes, and any public safety concerns.

Why this was flagged

This is a current traffic impact with potential travel disruption. Suggested treatment: story. Newsworthiness: 13/20 (immediacy 5, impact 4, conflict 1, novelty 3). Why now: A temporary intersection closure for construction is scheduled this month. Beat memory: similar topic 'Library Intersection Closure Scheduled' was first seen 2026-06-30T12:43:42.986306500+00:00, last seen 2026-06-30T12:43:42.986306500+00:00, and has appeared 1 previous time(s). Treat this as recurring/background unless the source shows a new vote, deadline, dollar amount, filing, outage, meeting item, or public impact.

Suggested next step

Verify the exact closure dates and times, affected roads, and any detour routes before drafting. What would make this publishable: The exact dates, times, affected roads, detour routes, and any public safety concerns. Compare against beat memory before drafting; write a story only if there is a new reportable fact.

CITY OF LONGMONT GOVERNMENT WEBSITE / AGENDA

City Council to vote on roof contract for library
Story
Ready to draft
Medium priority

A city council meeting agenda includes a vote on a contract for roof work at the public library. This impacts local government spending and construction timelines.

Why now: A council vote is scheduled this week regarding a public facility project.

Novelty: 3/5

Before publishing: The full agenda packet with details on the contract, vendor information, and any community input processes.

Why this was flagged

This is an upcoming council decision with potential city spending implications. Suggested treatment: story. Newsworthiness: 12/20 (immediacy 4, impact 3, conflict 2, novelty 3). Why now: A council vote is scheduled this week regarding a public facility project.

Suggested next step

Review the agenda packet for details on the contract amount, vendor information, and any community input processes before drafting. What would make this publishable: The full agenda packet with details on the contract, vendor information, and any community input processes.
